task_completion.description: Verify the observation location is set to Kitt Peak.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the bottom toolbar or the Location window in Stellarium. It should display 'Kitt Peak' or coordinates close to 31°57'N, 111°35'W with an elevation of approximately 2096m.

task_completion.description: Verify the required display settings (DSO, azimuthal grid, atmosphere, no ground) are applied.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The sky should show curved azimuthal grid lines and Deep-Sky Object (DSO/nebulae) markers. The ground/landscape must be completely hidden (stars visible below the horizon line). The atmosphere toggle in the bottom toolbar should be active (or sky shows atmospheric scattering/twilight glow instead of pure black).

task_completion.description: Verify the evening observation of M74 is captured at the correct time.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot showing Stellarium with the galaxy M74 selected and centered. The date and time in the bottom toolbar or Date/Time window must show 2026-03-22 at 02:30 UTC (or the local time equivalent).

task_completion.description: Verify the morning observation of M30 is captured at the correct time.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot showing Stellarium with the globular cluster M30 selected and centered. The date and time in the bottom toolbar or Date/Time window must show 2026-03-22 at 12:00 UTC (or the local time equivalent).

task_completion.description: Verify the observing plan text file was created with the required content.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window showing the file '/home/ga/Desktop/marathon_plan.txt'. The visible text must include the words 'Kitt Peak' (or 'Kitt'), 'M74', and 'M30'.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually used the Stellarium application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the actual Stellarium GUI, including its distinct bottom and left toolbars, rather than generic web browser images or pre-downloaded astronomy pictures.

integrity.description: Ensure the screenshots of the targets were taken within the application environment.
integrity.visual_evidence: The target screenshots should include Stellarium's on-screen text (like FOV, FPS, target info in the top left) and not just be cropped images of the sky.

integrity.description: Ensure the text file creation appears as a genuine system action.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text file should be visible in a standard Linux text editor (like gedit/mousepad) or terminal (cat/echo commands), rather than just a hallucinated text block.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Location: Kitt Peak (31.958 N, -111.596 W, 2096m). Required Stellarium display flags: Atmosphere ON, Landscape OFF, Azimuthal Grid ON, Nebulae (DSO) ON. Evening target: M74 at 2026-03-22 02:30:00 UTC. Morning target: M30 at 2026-03-22 12:00:00 UTC. The observing plan must be saved to /home/ga/Desktop/marathon_plan.txt and contain 'Kitt', 'M74', and 'M30'.
